new_classes.label_en: Wine with Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) in containers > 2 L and ≤ 10 L – other (subheading 2204 22 38)
new_classes.label_de: Wein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.) in Behältnissen > 2 L und ≤ 10 L – andere (Unterposition 2204 22 38)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes bearing a Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) as defined in additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres and not more than 10 litres, not elsewhere specified (i.e. other than Tokaj and the PDO wines covered by subheading 2204 22 26).

coverage_explanation: The core distinguishing criteria are covered: (1) PDO quality is captured via the ProtectedDesignationOfOriginOrGeographicalIndicationQuality restriction; (2) the container volume range > 2 L and ≤ 10 L is expressed via decimalRange restrictions on liquidVolumeInLitres and the LargeContainer part restriction; (3) sibling exclusion of Tokaj (2204 22 33) and the other PDO medium-container code (2204 22 26) is expressed via complement restrictions. Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the specific content of additional note 6(a) defining PDO criteria in detail is referenced but not modelled as a formal axiom (the note IRI/text was not provided in full, only cross-referenced); (b) the precise distinction between subheading 22042226 and 22042238 (which likely corresponds to different wine colour or style sub-categories within PDO wines in the 2–10 L range) is not independently verifiable from the legal note text supplied, so the sibling discrimination axiom is approximative.
